reasoning: Today's focus is on enhancing your lactate clearance and aerobic base, which is crucial given the 25W drop over 15 minutes in your power curve. This session will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop by incorporating over-unders to prepare you for the sustained climb and help reduce fatigue over longer durations.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x (8 mins at 201-218W, 2 mins at 242-256W) with 5 min recovery at 50% FTP between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
